query:
SELECT id, filename, created_at, updated_at, 
  JSON_EXTRACT(df_info, '$.groupByField') as groupByField,
  JSON_EXTRACT(df_info, '$.row_count') as row_count
FROM atlas_sessions 
ORDER BY created_at DESC 
LIMIT 10;
